title: Create /login page HTML structure and CSS
description: Create login.html with the shared card layout, heading, and a link to /signup for users without an account.
acceptance_criteria: Shares the same card container and CSS as signup.html (via auth.css)
Footer link: 'Don't have an account? Sign up' linking to /signup

steps.details: Copy base structure from signup.html. Change heading to 'Welcome back'. Change footer link to point to /signup.
